title: totem to pug
description: changes totem item texture to this cute pug
body:
**changes totem item texture to this cute pug**

you need to rename "totem of undying" to "pug"

![pug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef51f6414ba879c40d1d8fd0c51e39586b740dd6.png)

**requires cit**

(~~or optifine~~🤐)
